message:
fix(suggest): remove silent usize truncation in confidence calculations

usize_to_f64() was converting via u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX),
which silently caps values > 4 billion to u32::MAX. Replace with direct
`as f64` which handles the full usize range correctly (f64 has 53 bits
of mantissa precision, sufficient for practical issue counts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
